title: Braže: Latvia's allies know the truth about Russia's drone lies
summary_full: Foreign Minister Baiba Braže has said that Latvia's allies are fully aware that Russia is spreading disinformation about drone-related incidents in the Baltic states – though the Foreign Ministry continues to publish repeated public rebuttals of Russia's claims.
summary_public: Foreign Minister Baiba Braže has said that Latvia's allies are fully aware that Russia is spreading disinformation about drone-related incidents in the Baltic states – though the Foreign Ministry continues to publish rep…

LV.label: positive
LV.evidence: Latvia's allies know the truth about Russia's drone lies

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia is spreading disinformation about drone-related incidents
